member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: This type provides helper methods to make common use cases for Azure App Configuration easy.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.AddAzureAppConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds key-value data from an Azure App Configuration store to a configuration builder.
member.param: The configuration builder to add key-values to.
The connection string used to connect to the configuration store.

Determines the behavior of the App Configuration provider when an exception occurs while loading data from server. If false, the exception is thrown. If true, the exception is suppressed and no settings are populated from Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.AddAzureAppConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds key-value data from an Azure App Configuration store to a configuration builder.
member.param: The configuration builder to add key-values to.
The list of connection strings used to connect to the configuration store and its replicas.

Determines the behavior of the App Configuration provider when an exception occurs while loading data from server. If false, the exception is thrown. If true, the exception is suppressed and no settings are populated from Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.AddAzureAppConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds key-value data from an Azure App Configuration store to a configuration builder.
member.param: The configuration builder to add key-values to.
A callback used to configure Azure App Configuration options.

Determines the behavior of the App Configuration provider when an exception occurs while loading data from server. If false, the exception is thrown. If true, the exception is suppressed and no settings are populated from Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.AddAzureAppConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds Azure App Configuration services to the specified .
member.param: The to add services to.
member.returns: The so that additional calls can be chained.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the client used to fetch key vault references in an Azure App Configuration provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.SetCredential(Azure.Core.TokenCredential)
member.summary: Sets the credentials used to authenticate to key vaults that have no registered .
member.param: Default token credentials.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.ConfigureClientOptions(System.Action{Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets.SecretClientOptions})
member.summary: Configures the client options used when connecting to key vaults that have no registered . The client options will not affect instances registered via .
member.param: A callback used to configure secret client options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.Register(Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets.SecretClient)
member.summary: Registers the specified instance to use to resolve key vault references for secrets from associated key vault.
member.param: Secret client instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.SetSecretResolver(System.Func{System.Uri,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{System.String}})
member.summary: Sets the callback used to resolve key vault references that have no registered .
member.param: A callback that maps the of the key vault secret to its value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.SetSecretRefreshInterval(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the refresh interval for periodically reloading a secret from Key Vault. Any refresh operation triggered using will not update the value for a Key Vault secret until the cached value for that secret has expired.
member.param: Key of the Key Vault reference in Azure App Configuration.
Minimum time that must elapse before the secret is reloaded from Key Vault.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions.SetSecretRefreshInterval(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the refresh interval for periodically reloading all those secrets which do not have individual refresh intervals. Any refresh operation triggered using will not update the value for a Key Vault secret until the cached value for that secret has expired.
member.param: Minimum time that must elapse before the secrets are reloaded from Key Vault.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the behavior of an Azure App Configuration provider. If neither nor is ever called, all key-values with no label are included in the configuration provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ReplicaDiscoveryEnabled
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether replica discovery is enabled.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.LoadBalancingEnabled
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether load balancing is enabled.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ConnectionStrings
member.summary: The list of connection strings used to connect to an Azure App Configuration store and its replicas.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Endpoints
member.summary: The list of endpoints of an Azure App Configuration store. If this property is set, the property also needs to be set.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Credential
member.summary: The credential used to connect to the Azure App Configuration. If this property is set, the property also needs to be set.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.KeyValueSelectors
member.summary: A collection of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ChangeWatchers
member.summary: A collection of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.MultiKeyWatchers
member.summary: A collection of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Adapters
member.summary: A collection of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Mappers
member.summary: A collection of user defined functions that transform each .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.KeyPrefixes
member.summary: A collection of key prefixes to be trimmed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ClientManager
member.summary: An optional configuration client manager that can be used to provide clients to communicate with Azure App Configuration.
member.remarks: This property is used only for unit testing.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.MinBackoffDuration
member.summary: An optional timespan value to set the minimum backoff duration to a value other than the default.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ClientOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the client used to communicate with Azure App Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.IsKeyVaultConfigured
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether Key Vault options have been configured.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.IsKeyVaultRefreshConfigured
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether Key Vault secret values will be refreshed automatically.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.FeatureFlagTracing
member.summary: Indicates all types of feature filters used by the application.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Startup
member.summary: Options used to configure provider startup.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Select(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specify what key-values to include in the configuration provider. can be called multiple times to include multiple sets of key-values.
member.param: The key filter to apply when querying Azure App Configuration for key-values. An asterisk (*) can be added to the end to return all key-values whose key begins with the key filter. e.g. key filter `abc*` returns all key-values whose key starts with `abc`. A comma (,) can be used to select multiple key-values. Comma separated filters must exactly match a key to select it. Using asterisk to select key-values that begin with a key filter while simultaneously using comma separated key filters is not supported. E.g. the key filter `abc*,def` is not supported. The key filters `abc*` and `abc,def` are supported. For all other cases the characters: asterisk (*), comma (,), and backslash (\) are reserved. Reserved characters must be escaped using a backslash (\). e.g. the key filter `a\\b\,\*c*` returns all key-values whose key starts with `a\b,*c`. Built-in key filter options: .

The label filter to apply when querying Azure App Configuration for key-values. By default the null label will be used. Built-in label filter options: The characters asterisk (*) and comma (,) are not supported. Backslash (\) character is reserved and must be escaped using another backslash (\).

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.SelectSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Specify a snapshot and include its contained key-values in the configuration provider. can be called multiple times to include key-values from multiple snapshots.
member.param: The name of the snapshot in Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.UseFeatureFlags(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions})
member.summary: Configures options for Azure App Configuration feature flags that will be parsed and transformed into feature management configuration. If no filtering is specified via the then all feature flags with no label are loaded. All loaded feature flags will be automatically registered for refresh on an individual flag level.
member.param: A callback used to configure feature flag options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Connect(System.String)
member.summary: Connect the provider to the Azure App Configuration service via a connection string.
member.param: Used to authenticate with Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Connect(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Connect the provider to an Azure App Configuration store and its replicas via a list of connection strings.
member.param: Used to authenticate with Azure App Configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Connect(System.Uri,Azure.Core.TokenCredential)
member.summary: Connect the provider to Azure App Configuration using endpoint and token credentials.
member.param: The endpoint of the Azure App Configuration to connect to.
Token credentials to use to connect.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Connect(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Uri},Azure.Core.TokenCredential)
member.summary: Connect the provider to an Azure App Configuration store and its replicas using a list of endpoints and a token credential.
member.param: The list of endpoints of an Azure App Configuration store and its replicas to connect to.
Token credential to use to connect.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.TrimKeyPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Trims the provided prefix from the keys of all key-values retrieved from Azure App Configuration.
member.param: The prefix to be trimmed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ConfigureClientOptions(System.Action{Azure.Data.AppConfiguration.ConfigurationClientOptions})
member.summary: Configure the client(s) used to communicate with Azure App Configuration.
member.param: A callback used to configure Azure App Configuration client options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ConfigureRefresh(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions})
member.summary: Configure refresh for key-values in the configuration provider.
member.param: A callback used to configure Azure App Configuration refresh options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.GetRefresher
member.summary: Get an instance of that can be used to trigger a refresh for the registered key-values.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ConfigureKeyVault(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationKeyVaultOptions})
member.summary: Configures the Azure App Configuration provider to use the provided Key Vault configuration to resolve key vault references.
member.param: A callback used to configure Azure App Configuration key vault options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.Map(System.Func{Azure.Data.AppConfiguration.ConfigurationSetting,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{Azure.Data.AppConfiguration.ConfigurationSetting}})
member.summary: Provides a way to transform settings retrieved from App Configuration before they are processed by the configuration provider.
member.param: A callback registered by the user to transform each configuration setting.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationOptions.ConfigureStartupOptions(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.StartupOptions})
member.summary: Configure the provider behavior when loading data from Azure App Configuration on startup.
member.param: A callback used to configure Azure App Configuration startup options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationProvider.Load
member.summary: Loads (or reloads) the data for this provider.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationProviderRefreshEventSource.EventSourceName
member.summary: The name to use for the event source.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationProviderRefreshEventSource.Log
member.summary: Provides a singleton instance of the event source for callers to use for logging.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the refresh behavior of an Azure App Configuration provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions.Register(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Register the specified individual key-value to be refreshed when the configuration provider's triggers a refresh. The instance can be obtained by calling .
member.param: Key of the key-value. Cannot function as a key filter for a collection of key-values.
If true, a change in the value of this key refreshes all key-values being used by the configuration provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions.Register(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Register the specified individual key-value to be refreshed when the configuration provider's triggers a refresh. The instance can be obtained by calling .
member.param: Key of the key-value. Cannot function as a key filter for a collection of key-values.
Label of the key-value.
If true, a change in the value of this key refreshes all key-values being used by the configuration provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions.SetCacheExpiration(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the cache expiration time for the key-values registered for refresh. Default value is 30 seconds. Must be greater than 1 second. Any refresh operation triggered using will not update the value for a key until the cached value for that key has expired.
member.param: Minimum time that must elapse before the cache is expired.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureAppConfigurationRefreshOptions.SetRefreshInterval(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the minimum time interval between consecutive refresh operations for the registered key-values. Default value is 30 seconds. Must be greater than 1 second. Refresh operations triggered using will not make any server requests unless the refresh interval has elapsed since the key was last refreshed.
member.param: Minimum time that must elapse between each refresh for a specific key.

members.member: Uses the Azure Key Vault secret provider to resolve Key Vault references retrieved from Azure App Configuration. inputs the IKeyValue returns the keyname and actual value

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureKeyVault.CachedKeyVaultSecret.RefreshAt
member.summary: The time when this secret should be reloaded from Key Vault.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureKeyVault.CachedKeyVaultSecret.RefreshAttempts
member.summary: The number of times we tried to reload this secret.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureKeyVault.CachedKeyVaultSecret.LastRefreshTime
member.summary: The last time this secret was reloaded from Key Vault.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.AzureKeyVault.CachedKeyVaultSecret.SourceId
member.summary: The source for this secret.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.ConfigurationClientManager
member.summary: A configuration client manager which maintains state of configuration clients and provides set of clients to use when requested.
member.remarks: This class is not thread-safe. Since config provider does not allow multiple network requests at the same time, there won't be multiple threads calling this client at the same time.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.ConfigurationClientManager.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.ConfigurationClientWrapper})
member.summary: Internal constructor; Only used for unit testing.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException
member.summary: The exception that is thrown when there is an error resolving a reference to Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the System.Exception class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified. ///

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.Message
member.summary: Gets a message that describes the current exception. Returns The error message that explains the reason for the exception, or an empty string("").

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.Key
member.summary: The key of the Key Vault reference that caused the exception.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.Label
member.summary: The label of the Key Vault reference that caused the exception.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.Etag
member.summary: The etag of the Key Vault reference that caused the exception.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.SecretIdentifier
member.summary: The secret identifier used by the Azure Key Vault reference that caused the exception.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyVaultReferenceException.ErrorCode
member.summary: The error code, if available, describing the cause of the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.BytesExtensions.ToBase64Url(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts a byte array to Base64URL string with optional padding ('=') characters removed. Base64 description: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc4648.html#section-4

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.EventGridEventExtensions
member.summary: This class offers extensions for EventGridEvents.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.EventGridEventExtensions.TryCreatePushNotification(Azure.Messaging.EventGrid.EventGridEvent,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.PushNotification@)
member.summary: Tries to create the object from the details in object. Return value indicates whether the operation succeeded or failed.
member.param: EventGridEvent from EventGrid
If this method returns true, the pushNotification object contains details populated from eventGridEvent. If this method returns false, the pushNotification object is null.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.TimeSpanExtensions.CalculateBackoffTime(System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method calculates randomized exponential backoff times for operations that occur periodically on a given .
member.param: The periodic interval at which the operation occurs. If is less than , will be the maximum backoff time.. If is less than , is returned.
The minimum backoff time if is greater than .
The maximum backoff time if is greater than .
The number of attempts made to backoff.
member.returns: The calculated exponential backoff time, or if it is less than .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.TimeSpanExtensions.CalculateBackoffDuration(System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method calculates the jittered exponential backoff duration for the configuration store after a failure which lies between and .
member.param: The minimum duration to retry after.
The maximum duration to retry after.
The number of attempts made to the configuration store.
member.returns: The backoff duration before retrying a request to the configuration store or replica again.
member.exception: An exception is thrown when is less than 1.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Extensions.TimeSpanExtensions.TryGetFixedBackoff(System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan@)
member.summary: This method tries to get the fixed backoff duration for the elapsed startup time.
member.param: The time elapsed since the current startup began.
The backoff time span if getting the fixed backoff is successful.
member.returns: A boolean indicating if getting the fixed backoff duration was successful. Returns false if the elapsed startup time is greater than the fixed backoff window.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the feature flags to be parsed.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.FeatureFlagSelectors
member.summary: A collection of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.RefreshInterval
member.summary: The time after which feature flags can be refreshed. Must be greater than or equal to 1 second.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.Label
member.summary: The label that feature flags will be selected from.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.CacheExpirationInterval
member.summary: The time after which the cached values of the feature flags expire. Must be greater than or equal to 1 second.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.SetRefreshInterval(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the time after which feature flags can be refreshed.
member.param: Sets the minimum time interval between consecutive refresh operations for feature flags. Default value is 30 seconds. Must be greater than or equal to 1 second.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagOptions.Select(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specify what feature flags to include in the configuration provider. can be called multiple times to include multiple sets of feature flags.
member.param: The filter to apply to feature flag names when querying Azure App Configuration for feature flags. For example, you can select all feature flags that begin with "MyApp" by setting the featureflagFilter to "MyApp*". The characters asterisk (*), comma (,) and backslash (\) are reserved and must be escaped using a backslash (\). Built-in feature flag filter options: .

The label filter to apply when querying Azure App Configuration for feature flags. By default the null label will be used. Built-in label filter options: The characters asterisk (*) and comma (,) are not supported. Backslash (\) character is reserved and must be escaped using another backslash (\).

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagTracing
member.summary: Tracing for tracking built-in feature filter usage.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagTracing.CreateFiltersString
member.summary: Returns a formatted string containing code names, indicating which feature filters are used by the application.
member.returns: Formatted string like: "CSTM+PRCNT+TIME+TRGT", "PRCNT+TRGT", etc. If no filters are used, empty string will be returned.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.FeatureManagement.FeatureFlagTracing.CreateFeaturesString
member.summary: Returns a formatted string containing code names, indicating which tracing features are used by feature flags.
member.returns: Formatted string like: "Seed+ConfigRef+Telemetry". If no tracing features are used, empty string will be returned.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresher
member.summary: An interface used to trigger an update for the data registered for refresh with App Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresher.AppConfigurationEndpoint
member.summary: The App Configuration endpoint.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresher.RefreshAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes the data from App Configuration asynchronously.
member.param: The cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.exception: An error occurred when resolving a reference to an Azure Key Vault resource.
The request failed with an error code from the server.
The refresh operation failed with one or more errors. Check for more details.
The refresh operation was invoked before Azure App Configuration Provider was initialized.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresher.TryRefreshAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes the data from App Configuration asynchronously. A return value indicates whether the operation succeeded.
member.param: The cancellation token to cancel the operation.

members.member:
Process the details of a object to ensure the latest key-values are provided in the next request to App Configuration. The next request will be made after the cached values have been marked as dirty.
Fully populated object. /// Maximum delay before the cached value is marked as dirty. Default value is 30 seconds.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresherProvider
member.summary: An interface used to retrieve refresher instances for App Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.IConfigurationRefresherProvider.Refreshers
member.summary: List of instances of for App Configuration.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyFilter
member.summary: Defines well known key filters that are used within Azure App Configuration.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.KeyFilter.Any
member.summary: The filter that matches key-values with any keys.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.LabelFilter
member.summary: Defines well known label filters that are used within Azure App Configuration.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.LabelFilter.Null
member.summary: The filter that matches key-values with a null label.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueIdentifier.Key
member.summary: Key of the key-value in App Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueIdentifier.Label
member.summary: Label of the key-value in App Configuration.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector
member.summary: A selector used to control what key-values are retrieved from Azure App Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector.KeyFilter
member.summary: A filter that determines the set of keys that are included in the configuration provider.
member.remarks: See the documentation for this provider for details on the format of filter expressions

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector.LabelFilter
member.summary: A filter that determines what label to use when selecting key-values for the the configuration provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector.SnapshotName
member.summary: The name of the Azure App Configuration snapshot to use when selecting key-values for the configuration provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current object.
member.param: The object to compare with the current object.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current object; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueSelector.GetHashCode
member.summary: Serves as the hash function.
member.returns: A hash code for the current object.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueWatcher.Key
member.summary: Key of the key-value to be watched.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueWatcher.Label
member.summary: Label of the key-value to be watched.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueWatcher.RefreshAll
member.summary: A flag to refresh all key-values.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueWatcher.RefreshInterval
member.summary: The minimum time that must elapse before the key-value is refreshed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.Models.KeyValueWatcher.NextRefreshTime
member.summary: The next time when this key-value can be refreshed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.PushNotification
member.summary: An Object containing the details of a push Notification received from the Azure App Configuration service.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.PushNotification.ResourceUri
member.summary: The URI of the resource which triggered the .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.PushNotification.SyncToken
member.summary: The Synchronization Token to be added to the next request to the App Configuration Service.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.PushNotification.EventType
member.summary: The Type of Event which triggered the .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.HostType
member.summary: Type of host.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsKeyVaultConfigured
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether Key Vault options have been configured.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsKeyVaultRefreshConfigured
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether Key Vault secret values will be refreshed automatically.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsDevEnvironment
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether the request is from a development environment.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.ReplicaCount
member.summary: This value indicates number of replicas configured.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.FeatureFlagTracing
member.summary: Information about feature flags in the application, like filter and variant usage.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.FeatureManagementVersion
member.summary: Version of the Microsoft.FeatureManagement assembly, if present in the application.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.FeatureManagementAspNetCoreVersion
member.summary: Version of the Microsoft.FeatureManagement.AspNetCore assembly, if present in the application.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsSignalRUsed
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR assembly is present in the application.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsLoadBalancingEnabled
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether load balancing is enabled.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.IsFailoverRequest
member.summary: Flag to indicate whether the request is triggered by a failover.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.UsesAnyTracingFeature
member.summary: Checks whether any tracing feature is used.
member.returns: True if any tracing feature is used, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestTracingOptions.CreateFeaturesString
member.summary: Returns a formatted string containing code names, indicating which tracing features are used by the application.
member.returns: Formatted string like: "LB+SignalR". If no tracing features are used, empty string will be returned.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestType
member.summary: Types of read requests.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestType.Startup
member.summary: Indicate read for app initialization/startup.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.RequestType.Watch
member.summary: Indicate watch/observe type request.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.StartupOptions
member.summary: Options used when initially loading data into the configuration provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.AzureAppConfiguration.StartupOptions.Timeout
member.summary: The amount of time allowed to load data from Azure App Configuration on startup.
